pr.title: Record(?): WARP (Word-Aware Representation Priors) — val_bpb 1.0713 | 1xH100 10min | 13.65 MB

output.summary: Injects word-length, intra-word position, and type logit priors into the LeakyReLU-squared + Parallel Muon stack to recover BPE word boundaries.
techniques: Word-level priors via length/position embeddings and logit bias
Score-first TTT paired with context-only SLOT for adaptation
Disable EMA during short runs to avoid early averaging
